## BuiltIn.BuiltInData class

Provides access to built-in chocolate library data as an InMemoryFileTree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class BuiltInData 
```

## Methods

<table><thead><tr><th>

Method


</th><th>

Modifiers


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[getIngredientsDirectory()](./ts-chocolate.builtin.builtindata.getingredientsdirectory.md)


</td><td>

`static`


</td><td>

Gets the ingredients directory from the built-in library tree.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[getLibraryTree()](./ts-chocolate.builtin.builtindata.getlibrarytree.md)


</td><td>

`static`


</td><td>

Gets the full built-in library tree. The tree is structured to mirror a real filesystem library:

```
/
└── data/
    ├── ingredients/
    │   ├── common.json
    │   ├── felchlin.json
    │   ├── cacao-barry.json
    │   └── guittard.json
    ├── recipes/
    │   └── common.json
    ├── molds/
    │   └── common.json
    └── procedures/
        └── common.json
```


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[getMoldsDirectory()](./ts-chocolate.builtin.builtindata.getmoldsdirectory.md)


</td><td>

`static`


</td><td>

Gets the molds directory from the built-in library tree.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[getProceduresDirectory()](./ts-chocolate.builtin.builtindata.getproceduresdirectory.md)


</td><td>

`static`


</td><td>

Gets the procedures directory from the built-in library tree.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[getRecipesDirectory()](./ts-chocolate.builtin.builtindata.getrecipesdirectory.md)


</td><td>

`static`

Gets the recipes directory from the built-in library tree.
